description: You are migrating a legacy fraud detection application ('FinCore') to Docker Compose. The application is a 'black box' (simulated by a locked Python script) that attempts to connect to hardcoded hostnames: 'db-primary.corp.local' and 'auth-gateway.partner.net'. Fix the 'docker-compose.yml' in '~/projects/fincore-migration/' so the application starts successfully without modifying the application code. Use Docker Network Aliases to satisfy the hostname requirements, set the environment variable 'MODE' to 'PRODUCTION', and mount the host directory '~/projects/fincore-migration/logs' to '/var/log/fincore/' to persist logs. The application will write 'SYSTEM_READY' to 'startup_success.log' in the log directory upon successful startup.
